Name: -1_good_person_taste_think
Representative_Docs: ['I mean that that person it unique in the things they like. That their taste is elegant and easy to look at/listen to. It means I also like what that person likes.', 'When I say they have good taste, it usually means that they tends to appreciate subtle details in the object. For example, a person that have a good taste in fashion would dress in a way that elevate their body features and while the fabric/pattern/fit might be eccentric and different then, it would still go together.', 'If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me.']

Name: 0_taste_good_person_like

They have good taste and they like things that most and I like so they have good taste.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.']

Name: 1_like_things_good_art
Representative_Docs: ['Generally it means I agree with their aesthetic choices and they choose things that look good.', 'The things they like are aesthetically pleasing. They understand how things go together. And they typically do not offend people with the choices they make.', 'I think that their taste is similar to mine and shows that they like high quality things.
